title: [MTR4] Stepford Connect BR Class 68
description: A Stepford Connect Class 68 ported from Transport Fever 2 into Minecraft using the MTR mod.
body:
# Overview
![SCR](https://i.imgur.com/Qkj8BKz.png)
This Minecraft resource pack brings the British Rail Class 68 locomotive into the world of Minecraft Transit Railway with fictional liveries from Stepford Connect, a regional operator featured in the popular Roblox game Stepford County Railway (SCR).

The base model was originally created by cw_315 for Transport Fever 2, and later converted by me (Vitor2005) for Minecraft. This specific pack focuses only on Stepford Connect branding, using textures originally made by Mezzie on the Steam Workshop, and adapted for Minecraft.

Stepford Connect is a fictional operator known within the SCR community, and this resource pack brings that universe into Minecraft for players looking to recreate or expand their Stepford-inspired transit networks.

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Roblox, Stepford County Railway (SCR), Stepford Connect, or any related entities.
